No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to health, well-being, or related medical/public health topics.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops foundational skills in logical reasoning and scientific computing for employment (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to water, sanitation, or related environmental management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops skills in mathematical modeling and scientific computing, which are foundational for technological upgrading and innovation, indirectly supporting economic productivity (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course enhances scientific research and technological capabilities (Target 9.5) by teaching differential geometry, its applications, and the ability to build mathematical models, which are fundamental for innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to reducing inequalities in income, opportunity, or social inclusion.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to urban planning, sustainable infrastructure, or community development.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to sustainable consumption, resource efficiency, or waste reduction.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to peace, justice, governance, or institutional development.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus connects to global partnerships, financing, or capacity building for SDGs.
